"'''Tusken Rustlers'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Sterling Hershey]] in [[2005]]. It depicts an attempt by [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] to capture a [[Reek/Legends|reek]] from a [[Moisture farm/Legends|moisture farm]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Game-stub}}
